name: JustMLC's Source
subtitle: A source for all of my apps.

apps.name: Rayman Classic Patcher
apps.subtitle: WiFi crash fix & ultra widescreen support.
apps.localizedDescription:
A patcher for Rayman Classic (iOS) that resolves an issue where the game crashes when WiFi is enabled.
It also adds ultra widescreen support for modern displays.

versions.localizedDescription:
Initial release.
- Fixes the WiFi crash in Rayman Classic
- Adds ultra widescreen support
